title: KhalihMortimer mace
description: ⚠️ This is the texture pack used by KhalihMortimer — one of the most well-known Minecraft Mace PvP creators and a retired HT1 mace player.
body:
KhalihMortimer Pack Release — 1.21.4+

**CREDITS: 1nkboy**

⚠️ This is the texture pack used by KhalihMortimer.
This is NOT the official texture pack.

Designed for Mace PvP gameplay and inspired by the visuals used in KhalihMortimer’s videos and clips.

Features
Clean PvP textures
Optimized for 1.21.4
Better visibility during fights
Custom weapon/item textures
Smooth GUI and particles
FPS-friendly design
Notes

This pack is a recreation/inspired version and is not directly made or officially released by KhalihMortimer.

Used by fans of HT1 Mace PvP and competitive Minecraft gameplay.
